programme.title: Secret Science
programme.desc: Matt Okine discovers that when it comes to making babies, it's not always easy. He's surprised to learn in the last 40 years, men's sperm count has dropped by 50%. So what men can do to improve that number? (Part 1)

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: National Press Club Address
programme.desc: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision-makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport, and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Ghosts of Saigon

programme.title: Bioskop Asia: The Seventh Curse
programme.desc: Ketika seorang dokter menyelamatkan seorang wanita cantik dari Suku Cacing, ia menerima tujuh kutukan. Ia kemudian pergi ke Thailand untuk menemukan obat mujarab, tetapi ia harus melarikan diri dari cengkeraman Suku Cacing.

programme.title: Bioskop Asia: The Seventh Curse
programme.desc: Ketika seorang dokter menyelamatkan seorang wanita cantik dari Suku Cacing, ia menerima tujuh kutukan. Ia kemudian pergi ke Thailand untuk menemukan obat mujarab, tetapi ia harus melarikan diri dari cengkeraman Suku Cacing.

programme.title: Bioskop Asia: I Love Maria
programme.desc: Ketika Pioneer 2 rusak saat menjalankan misi untuk membunuh anggota geng buangan, seorang penemu di kepolisian mengambilnya dan mengubah sebagian programnya.

programme.title: Mega Bollywood: Dear Zindagi
programme.desc: Kaira mulai menderita insomnia usai menghadapi serangkaian kemerosotan dalam karier dan percintaan. Ia pun menghubungi seorang psikolog bernama Dr. Jehangir Khan yang menggunakan metode inkonvensional untuk merawatnya.

programme.title: Ummi
programme.desc: Kisah perjuangan Ummi Marwah, seorang ustazah, dalam menjaga keutuhan rumah tangga dan mendidik anak-anaknya. Abah Asep, suaminya, berperilaku arogan dan selingkuh dengan asisten rumah tangga.

programme.title: Kasautii
programme.desc: Anurag dan Prerna kuliah di universitas yang sama, dan akhirnya menjalin hubungan erat. Namun, mereka harus menghadapi orang-orang yang ingin memisahkan keduanya, karena perbedaan status sosial.

programme.title: Janji Cinta Inspektur Virat
programme.desc: Kisah seorang inspektur yang terlibat dalam kisah percintaan segitiga.

programme.title: Mega Bollywood: Dil To Pagal Hai
programme.desc: Musikal megah tentang tiga karakter yang penuh gairah dan mimpi: Rahul, Pooja, dan Nisha. Akankah impian mereka menjadi kenyataan? Akankah mereka menemukan cinta sejati mereka?

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda yang bersemangat memulai perjalanan untuk memenuhi janji seorang ibu demi kehidupan yang lebih baik sambil mengatasi tantangan dan kehilangan.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Vasudha yang periang bergabung dengan rumah pemimpin bisnis Chandrika sebagai pembantu dan mendambakan persetujuannya meskipun ada perbedaan ideologis di antara mereka.

programme.title: Sinema Laga Klasik: Roro Mendut
programme.desc: Cerita tentang Roro Mendut dengan kisahnya bersama Pronocitro yang kemudian terhalang oleh kungkungan Tumenggung Wiroguno.

programme.title: Sinema Spesial: Malam Satu Suro
programme.desc: Setelah roh pendendam diberi kesempatan kedua untuk menjalani kehidupan normal, keluarganya diserang dan dia terpaksa membalas dendam.

programme.title: Serie A 2025/26: Napoli vs Cremonese
programme.desc: Liga Italia Serie A merupakan kompetisi sepak bola profesional tertinggi di sistem liga sepak bola Italia. Sebanyak 20 klub bersaing untuk memperebutkan juara kompetisi ini.

programme.title: Mega Bollywood: Oh Darling Yeh Hai India
programme.desc: Seorang gangster berencana mengambil alih negara dengan mengganti presiden dengan orang yang mirip. Seorang pria dan wanita, yang merupakan orang asing, mengetahui konspirasi ini dan mencoba menyelamatkan negara.

programme.title: Kasautii

programme.title: Mega Bollywood: Bas Itna Sa Khwaab Hai
programme.desc: Surya berasal dari kota kecil dan menganggap Naved Ali sebagai idolanya. Dia masuk perguruan tinggi di Mumbai dan menerima penghargaan dari Naved Ali atas keberaniannya.

programme.title: Jhanak

programme.title: Sinema Laga Klasik: Balada Cinta Angling Darma
programme.desc: Anglingdarma yang memiliki ilmu dan bisa mendengar bahasa binatang, membuat istrinya minta diajari olehnya. Namun Anglingdarma tidak mau. Istrinya beranggapan ia tidak cinta lagi dengan dirinya. Istrinya pun berniat membakar diri dan Anglingdarma pun juga ingin melakukan hal yang sama, namun terdengar suara yang membuat ia berhenti, tapi istrinya sudah membakar diri. Karena merasa bersalah Anglingdarma pun menjelma menjadi belibis. Tapi atas paksaan Batik Madrim ia kembali.

programme.title: Sinema Spesial: Panggonan Wingit
programme.desc: Dua orang kakak-beradik bertolak ke Semarang untuk membantu mengelola sebuah hotel yang misterius. Di hotel itu, mereka menemukan suatu rahasia kelam dan kutukan maut.

programme.title: Ep36 : The Catch-Up Show
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MW33: Burnley v Manchester City : Match Highlights 25/26
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MW33: Bournemouth v Leeds United : Match Highlights 25/26
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: Ep37: Diego Gomez : The Big Interview
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team. This week, Gomez sits down with The Big Interview to reflect on his journey so far, the challenges of adapting to the Premier League, life at Brighton, and his ambitions with Paraguay as he looks ahead to the future.

programme.title: Ep47: Norwegian Strikers : PL Stories
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjaer and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generational bridge to his son, Erling Haaland; a modern phenomenon redefining goal-scoring records. A PL Stories show that asks whether the qualities that once defined a nation's footballing identity still pulse through the DNA of its most unstoppable striker today.

programme.title: Ep09: Gary Cahill : PL Moments
programme.desc: PL Moments combines archive and first person testimony to revisit the very best games, goals, players and performances from the last 30 years.

programme.title: Ep36 : The Catch-Up Show
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: Ars v New : Classic Match
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2012/2013 season.

programme.title: Ep18: Ray Parlour: The Invincibles 03/04 : Rewind
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: MW33: Burnley v Manchester City : Match Highlights 25/26
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MW33: Bournemouth v Leeds United : Match Highlights 25/26
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: Wol v Tot : Classic Match
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2010/2011 season.

programme.title: Ep34: Rodrigo Gomes : The Big Interview
programme.desc: Ruben Neves, Joao Moutinho, Jose Sa. Wolverhampton Wanderers have a long history of Portuguese players shining in the Old Gold at Molineux. Another player looking to add his name to that list is Rodrigo Gomes. This week, Gomes is joined by Shaun Wright-Phillips to discuss his journey from the Braga academy to joining Wolves in 2024. The pair also take an in-depth look at his play this season, and head to the training pitch to recreate some iconic Wolves goals.

programme.title: Ep37: Diego Gomez : The Big Interview
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team. This week, Gomez sits down with The Big Interview to reflect on his journey so far, the challenges of adapting to the Premier League, life at Brighton, and his ambitions with Paraguay as he looks ahead to the future.

programme.title: Ep36 : The Catch-Up Show
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: Ep28: (Subbed) Regis Le Bris : PL Stories
programme.desc: We join Regis Le Bris as he charts his meteoric journey from the training pitches of France to the dugout at Sunderland, where he masterminded an unlikely charge to the Premier League. Le Bris reflects on the philosophy and resilience that helped his side punch far above their weight. We also travel back to France to uncover the formative experiences and influences that shaped one of football's most intriguing modern managers.

programme.title: Ep09: Kevin Phillips: My Sunderland Years : Rewind
programme.desc: Kevin Phillips remembers the unforgettable 1999/00 season, when he took the Premier League by storm with 30 goals for Sunderland - a tally that made him the top scorer in European football that campaign.

programme.title: Ep13: Adam Lallana: My Premier League Years : Rewind
programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: Ep47: Norwegian Strikers : PL Stories
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjaer and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generational bridge to his son, Erling Haaland; a modern phenomenon redefining goal-scoring records. A PL Stories show that asks whether the qualities that once defined a nation's footballing identity still pulse through the DNA of its most unstoppable striker today.
